operating_state: No quarterly operating performance data was disclosed in the provided 8-K filings. The September 25, 2025 filing references fourth quarter fiscal 2025 results but the actual financial metrics are contained in attached exhibits not included in this filing text.
cost_structure: No cost structure or margin information was disclosed in the provided 8-K filings. Operating expense trends and gross margin dynamics would be contained in the earnings release exhibits referenced but not included in the filing text.
material_events: The Board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share on July 15, 2025, payable August 15, 2025 to shareholders of record August 1, 2025. Russ Miller, Senior Executive Vice President and COO for U.S. and Mexico Operations, will retire effective February 2026, with Caton Frates appointed as his successor in the role of Senior Executive Vice President, Warehouse Operations - U.S. and Mexico.
macro_exposures: No new or materially escalated macro risk exposures were disclosed in the provided 8-K filings during the third quarter period.
forward_outlook: No forward guidance or strategic direction was provided in the 8-K filings. Management outlook and capital allocation plans would be contained in the earnings release exhibits referenced but not included in the filing text.
uncertainty_profile: No material contingencies, pending regulatory matters, or unresolved uncertainties were disclosed in the provided 8-K filings during the third quarter period.
